name: Heliox Arm Operator
resist: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks

trait.name: Integrated Harness
entries: While within 5 feet of a control station, the Heliox Arm Operator has advantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws, and it can't be forcibly moved more than 10 feet by nonmagical effects.

trait.name: Boarder Rejection Protocol
entries: The Heliox Arm Operator has advantage on opportunity attacks against creatures that are climbing, jumping, or boarding a vehicle or structure.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Heliox Arm Operator makes two Servo Slam attacks.

action.name: Servo Slam
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) bludgeoning damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be pushed 10 feet.

action.name: Clamp and Toss (Recharge 5-6)
entries: One creature within 10 feet must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or take 18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) bludgeoning damage and be grappled (escape DC 15). While grappled this way, the Heliox Arm Operator can use a bonus action on its next turn to throw the target up to 20 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. The thrown creature lands prone and takes 7 ({@damage 2d6}) bludgeoning damage.
